messages.content: next following questions are based from GFEBS PM order Management & execution. they will be suited with multiple choice. please select the best answer.

1. Which of the following actions must occur before a work order can be closed in GFEBS PM?
A. The work order must be entered into the system
B. The work order must be approved by the supervisor
C. The work order must have all necessary parts and materials ordered and received
D. The work order must be completed and verified by the technician

Answer: D. The work order must be completed and verified by the technician

2. In GFEBS PM, what is the purpose of a maintenance plan?
A. To track maintenance expenses over time
B. To ensure maintenance tasks are completed on schedule
C. To estimate the cost of maintenance activities
D. To generate purchase orders for maintenance supplies

Answer: B. To ensure maintenance tasks are completed on schedule

3. Which of the following is a function of the GFEBS PM work center?
A. Managing financial transactions
B. Scheduling work orders
C. Managing inventory levels
D. Generating reports on maintenance activities

Answer: B. Scheduling work orders

4. What is the benefit of using GFEBS PM for maintenance management?
A. It automates the process of ordering materials
B. It generates invoices for customers
C. It allows for better planning and tracking of maintenance activities
D. It provides real-time analysis of maintenance expenses

Answer: C. It allows for better planning and tracking of maintenance activities

5. Which GFEBS PM feature allows managers to track the status of work orders?
A. Notification system
B. Dashboard
C. Maintenance plan
D. Work center

Answer: B. Dashboard

next following questions are based from GFEBS PM order Management & execution. they will be suited with multiple choice. please select the best answer.  "If the newly-created work notification is a duplicate, the Work Notification Processor or Order Approver ______. 
cancels the new work notification    creates a new work order and references the existing order    assigns the new work notification to the existing work order    should allow GFEBS to automatically align the notifications with the work order"
Answer: Assigns the new work notification to the existing work order.

The Maintenance Fund Execution Structure (MFES) allows the Army to align planning and execution along the various ______. 
lines of accounting for each building category    local tenant activities    installation activities    organizational structures
Answer: Organizational structures.

Operations Work Orders (OWOs) are created when the scope of work is a ______. 
Special Operation Order    Project Operation Order    Normal Operation Order    Standard Operation Order
Answer: Special Operation Order.

The work order process ends when what action is completed? 
Work is executed    Work Order is closed    Notification Approved    Work Order Approved
Answer: Work Order is closed.

If the scope and cost of work exceeds the DMO funding restrictions, a(n) ______ may be created. 
Project Order    Individual Job Order    Operations Work Order    Special Operations Order
Answer: Project Order.

Information located under the ______ tab for Maintenance orders describes the equipment, which includes the equipment number, an equipment description, and functional location. 
Objects    Location    Components    Additional Data
Answer: Objects.

Who provides the information required for a work notification? 
The Work Notification Processor    The individual calling in the request    The individual identified as the POC    The individual assigned to complete the work
Answer: The individual calling in the request.

What status is assigned when the cost, which has accrued to an order, is debited to one or more allocation receivers belonging to financial or management accounting? 
Settlement (SETC)    Confirmation (CNF)    Partial Confirmation (PCNF)    Technically Complete (TECO)
Answer: Settlement (SETC).
What is your question?

GFEBS transaction code IW34 is used to convert the Notification to an Order. The work notification can be converted into either a Demand Maintenance Order (DMO) or a(n) ______. 
Project Work Order    Operations Work Order    Special Operation Order    Preventative Maintenance Order
Answer: Preventative Maintenance Order.

transaction code is used to produce a list of orders that can be changed? 
IW31    IW38    IW39    IW28
Transaction code IW38 is used to produce a list of orders that can be changed.

A(n) ______ is a collection of resources that execute a work request. 
Unit    Plant    Activity    Work Center
Answer: Work Center.

What is the next step in the process once the required parts or material have been identified as being needed for completion of a maintenance order? 
Copy material to order    Issue material to order    Determine stock availability    Search for and validate material number
Answer: Determine stock availability.

When creating a Demand Maintenance Order (DMO), all of the information shown is entered under the header tab, except for the ______. 
Priority    WBS Element    Main Work Center    Functional Location
Answer: Main Work Center.

When performing the process of distribution of overhead, a ______ can be run before making the actual distribution. 
test run    mock distribution    trial distribution    pre-distribution run
Answer: Test run.

The three types of task lists in GFEBS are ______. 
Equipment, General, and Operational    Equipment, Specific, and Operational    Equipment, General, and Functional Location    Equipment, Specific, and Functional Location
Answer: Equipment, General, and Functional Location.

In GFEBS, the identification of the place where a maintenance task is performed is called a(n) ______. 
job site    activity    work center    functional location
Answer: Functional location.

In the purchase requisition process for material required for a maintenance order, the request for quotation is ______. 
not used    optional    automatically processed by GFEBS    manually processed outside of GFEBS
Answer: Optional.

A ______ identifies the receiver of the cost for the order. 
cost transfer    settlement rule    billing document    distribution matrix
Answer: Settlement rule.

Which of the following statements is true, concerning reports produced from the GFEBS Enterprise Central Component (ECC)? 
They are real-time reported    The format is pre-determined    They will produce the same results time after time    They are used to fulfill regulatory requirements time
Answer: They are used to fulfill regulatory requirements.

When converting a work notification to a work order, the first thing that needs to be determined is if the work is  ______. 
hazardous    an emergency    a new requirement    to be contracted out
Answer: to be contracted out.
half of the answers you provided me are wrong

I apologize for any incorrect answers provided. As an AI language model, I strive to provide accurate and up-to-date information based on the questions and information provided to me. However, at times, errors can occur. Can you please provide me with specific questions and their incorrect answers so that I can review and correct them?
